2605.22080.title: JMed48k: A Multi-Profession Japanese Medical Licensing Benchmark for Vision-Language Model Evaluation
2605.22080.paper_summary: We introduce JMed48k, a multi-profession Japanese healthcare licensing benchmark for evaluating vision-language models. Built from official PDF materials released by the Japanese Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare, JMed48k contains 48,862 exam questions and 20,142 images from 11 national licensing examinations between 2005 and 2025, with visual content annotated under an 8-type taxonomy. From this corpus, we derive JMed48k-Eval, a recent five-year evaluation subset with 12,484 scored questions, including 9,905 text-only questions and 2,579 questions with images. We evaluate 21 proprietary, open-source, and medical-specific models, reporting text-only and with-image performance separately. Because these subsets contain different questions, we further introduce a paired image-removal audit that evaluates questions with images before and after removing visual content to explore four answer-transition states. The audit shows that proprietary and open source models gain substantially from images, whereas medical-specific systems show limited observable use of visual evidence, with many correct answers persisting after image removal. Even among proprietary models, the net image-removal effect varies sevenfold across professions, from +5.7 points on Physician questions to +39.8 points on Public Health Nurse questions. We release JMed48k to support reproducible, profession-stratified evaluation of vision-language models in medical licensing settings.
2605.22080.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 JMed48k，這是一個多專業的日本醫療執照基準，用於評估視覺-語言模型。JMed48k 由日本厚生勞動省發布的官方 PDF 資料構建，包含 48,862 道考題和 20,142 張來自 2005 年至 2025 年的 11 次國家執照考試的圖片，視覺內容依據 8 種類型進行標註。從這個語料庫中，我們衍生出 JMed48k-Eval，這是一個最近五年的評估子集，包含 12,484 道有分數的考題，其中包括 9,905 道僅有文字的問題和 2,579 道帶有圖片的問題。我們評估了 21 種專有、開源和醫療特定模型，分別報告僅文字和帶圖片的性能。由於這些子集包含不同的問題，我們進一步引入了一個配對的圖片移除審核，評估在移除視覺內容前後的帶圖片問題，以探索四種答案轉換狀態。審核顯示，專有和開源模型在圖片方面獲益頗多，而醫療特定系統對視覺證據的可觀使用有限，許多正確答案在移除圖片後仍然存在。即使在專有模型中，淨圖片移除效果在不同專業間的變化達到七倍，從醫生問題的 +5.7 分到公共衛生護士問題的 +39.8 分。我們發布 JMed48k 以支持在醫療執照環境中對視覺-語言模型進行可重複的、按專業分層的評估。
2605.22080.author: Yue Xun et.al.
2605.22080.authors: Yue Xun, Junyu Liu, Qian Niu, Xinyi Wang, Zheng Yuan, Zirui Li, Zequn Zhang, Bowen Zhao, Shujun Wang, Irene Li, Kan Hatakeyama-Sato, Yusuke Iwasawa, Yutaka Matsuo
